title: Rounding the Square Root to the Nearest Half Integer

statement.markdown: Given a positive integer n, return the square root of n rounded to the nearest half integer. If the square root is an integer, return it as is.
statement.inputFormat: Input is a single positive integer n
statement.outputFormat: Output is the square root of n rounded to the nearest half integer
statement.notes: You can use the built-in sqrt function from cmath module or sqrt() method from Math class

starterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: double myFunc(int n) { // TODO: implement } };
starterCode.java: public class Solution { public double myFunc(int n) { // TODO: implement return; } }
starterCode.python: class Solution: def myFunc(self, n: int) -> float: # TODO: implement pass

buggyStarterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: double myFunc(int n) { double sqrt = sqrt(n); // rounding to integer here } };
buggyStarterCode.java: public class Solution { public double myFunc(int n) { double sqrt = Math.sqrt(n); // rounding to integer here return sqrt; } }
buggyStarterCode.python: class Solution: def myFunc(self, n: int) -> float: # rounding to integer here sqrt = n ** 0.5 return sqrt
buggyStarterCode.javascript: function myFunc(n) { // rounding to integer here var sqrt = Math.sqrt(n) return sqrt; }
